vibe: Authoritative, modern, developer-first API platform. High contrast, clean grid borders, technical but accessible.

headings.usage: Use for all main headings (H1-H4). Maximum text-6xl for Hero H1.

body.import_instructions: Import IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts
body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, and standard text elements.

mono.import_instructions: Import JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts
mono.usage: API keys, code snippets, numbers, statistics, and small technical overlines.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 for major sections.
layout_spacing.grid_system: Bento grids for features. Strict structural grids for the dashboard. Use 'border-collapse' style grid layouts to expose the grid visually.
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (4px) to maintain a sharp, technical feel.

surface_strategies.marketing_header: Crystal Glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-200. Must have z-50.
surface_strategies.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background (#FFFFFF), sharp 1px border (#E5E7EB), no shadow by default. Hover adds shadow-sm and slightly darkens border.
surface_strategies.code_blocks: Deep black (#0A0A0A) background, JetBrains Mono font, light gray text, with subtle border.
surface_strategies.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00258A]. Accent buttons: bg-[#EDFF00] text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#D4E600]. Sharp corners (rounded-sm).

motion_interactions.hover_states: Buttons must have explicit hover states (e.g. hover:bg-opacity-90). Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) with border color change.
motion_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion_interactions.animations: Subtle fade-in for lists/tables. Use Framer Motion for complex dashboard tab switches.

hero_image.description: Abstract 3D technical illustration of connected nodes and data pipelines representing API messaging.
hero_image.placement: Landing page hero section right side or background with low opacity overlay.

feature_image.description: Abstract geometric representation of data packets being delivered.
feature_image.placement: Landing page features section or API docs preview.

developer_context.description: Close-up view of code on screen.
developer_context.placement: API Documentation section or Developer tools highlight.

component_instructions.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Keep inputs sharp (rounded-sm) with focus-visible:ring-[#002FA7].
component_instructions.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Dense layout. Right-align numeric data. Use JetBrains Mono for IDs and Status badges.
component_instructions.charts: Use Recharts (or Shadcn Charts). Lines/Bars should use the primary brand color (#002FA7). Clean tooltips.
component_instructions.modals: Use Shadcn Dialog for QR code scanning and adding new customers. Backdrop blur is mandatory for overlays.
component_instructions.alerts: Use Sonner for toast notifications. Top-right positioning.
component_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

iconography.style: Use regular or duotone weights for dashboard, bold for marketing highlights.

main_agent_instructions: Build the Landing Page in pure React/Tailwind (no Shadcn layout containers) using strict grid and large typography.
Build the Dashboard using a dense layout, Shadcn components (Cards, Tables, Dialogs), and a fixed sidebar or top nav.
Do NOT use typical WhatsApp green (#25D366) as the primary brand color. Rely on the defined high-contrast Blue/Black/Yellow palette to stand out.
Ensure the QR code modal for linking WhatsApp sessions feels native and secure (blur background, clear instructions).
Include code snippets styled similarly to Vercel/Stripe in the API Documentation section.
